title: solidago canadensis var. bartramiana
intro: Solidago canadensis var. bartramiana, also known as Bartram's goldenrod, is a variant of the common goldenrod plant, which is a flowering perennial plant native to eastern North America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Bartram's goldenrod include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, flu, and other infections. Bartram's goldenrod can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
